note: GRX-009 segment 4g measured fallback telemetry: with rendering/rurix_accel/passes/luminance_reduction/enabled=true the tracked Godot Auto Exposure call site invoked the shipping (feature-off) Rurix bridge, which returned RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK (observed via the tracked patch-0002 marker), and the native Godot luminance path rendered the frame. The 0002-level module call carries no resource bindings, so the bridge preflight records validation_failed by construction. runtime_state stays fallback_only, real_gpu_pass=false, and no performance or FPS claim is made.
